themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Word-study detail reinforces "עָשׂ֤וּ: they made - to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application".
